# Dr. Kacey Kiesman — Naturopathic Doctor, Kelowna BC

> Dr. Kacey Kiesman is a licensed Naturopathic Doctor (ND) and Registered Nurse (RN) practicing in Kelowna, British Columbia. She provides personalized, root-cause naturopathic medicine and aesthetic treatments at Springbok Medical Clinic. No referral is required.

## About Dr. Kiesman

Dr. Kiesman holds dual credentials as a Naturopathic Doctor and Registered Nurse. She grew up in Prince Rupert, BC, earned her nursing degree in Vancouver, and pursued naturopathic medicine to focus on root-cause care rather than symptom management alone. She practices evidence-based naturopathic medicine combined with modern diagnostics and aesthetic treatments.

- **Practitioner:** Dr. Kacey Kiesman, ND, RN
- **Clinic:** Springbok Medical Clinic
- **Address:** 590 McKay Ave #200, Kelowna, BC V1Y 5A8
- **Phone:** (778) 940-9811
- **Hours:** Monday–Thursday 9am–6pm | Friday 9am–4pm
- **Service Area:** In-person in Kelowna; virtual consultations available across British Columbia
- **Booking:** Online at springbokmedicalspa.janeapp.com (no referral required)

## Naturopathic Services

Dr. Kiesman offers evidence-informed naturopathic care for:

- **Women's Health** — Hormonal balance, fertility, menopause, PMS, PCOS, thyroid health
- **Digestive Health** — IBS, bloating, food sensitivities, SIBO, constipation, gut microbiome
- **Fatigue & Energy** — Chronic fatigue, adrenal dysregulation, burnout, low energy
- **Weight Optimization** — Metabolism, hormonal factors, inflammation, sustainable strategies
- **Preventative Care** — Personalized lab work, nutritional support, lifestyle optimization

Initial consultations: 60 minutes / $280 CAD. Follow-ups: 15–45 minutes / $85–$205 CAD.
Many extended health plans in BC cover naturopathic visits. Direct billing available.

## IV Therapy

Vitamin and mineral IV drips administered by Dr. Kiesman for hydration, energy, immunity, and recovery.

- Myers' Cocktail (100 ml): $140 | (250 ml): $185
- Iron IV Consult: $70 | Iron IV Administration: $150
- NAD+: $50–$85
- Glutathione add-on: $50–$70
- B12 / B-Complex: $40–$55

An initial IV consult ($70) is required before first treatment.

## Aesthetic Treatments

- **Botox** — $10/unit. Natural-looking wrinkle reduction by a licensed practitioner
- **Dermal Filler** — $600/syringe. Volume restoration and facial contouring
- **Morpheus8** — $700–$1,500/session. RF microneedling for skin tightening and rejuvenation
- **Laser Treatments (DiolazeXL)** — $60–$400/session. Laser hair removal and skin resurfacing

Aesthetic treatments are private-pay; not covered by MSP or insurance.

## Physical Therapies

- **Acupuncture** — Initial: $150 | Follow-up: $120
- **Cupping** — Initial: $150 | Follow-up: $120
